issue_title: Month view "datasetName" doesn't function as a title when "mode: annotation" is set
issue_body_preview:
<!--- Provide a general summary of the issue in the Title above -->
When I set "mode: annotation" for the month view, the datasetName no longer functions as the title

## Expected Behavior
<!--- If you're describing a bug, tell us what should happen -->

test_description_zh: 在 Obsidian Tracker 插件中创建一个月视图（month view），同时设置 mode 为 annotation 并配置 datasetName 参数，观察月视图上方是否正确显示 datasetName 作为标题。
expected_result_zh: 当月视图设置 mode: annotation 时，datasetName 应正常显示为月视图的标题，与非 annotation 模式下的行为一致。
